entities.name: CEREALS
entities.description: Staple crops including rice and wheat used for food supply

entities.name: ABIOTIC STRESS TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to withstand non-biological environmental stresses

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The amount of grain produced per unit area

entities.name: PLANT BREEDING
entities.description: The science of changing the traits of plants to produce desired characteristics

entities.name: TRANSGENIC INTERVENTIONS
entities.description: The use of transgenic techniques to introduce foreign genes for trait improvement

entities.name: GENETIC ENHANCEMENT
entities.description: The process of improving the genetic makeup of a crop

entities.name: ABIOTIC STRESS
entities.description: Non-biological environmental factors that negatively impact plant growth

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: Long-term shifts in temperatures and weather patterns

entities.name: WATER SCARCITY
entities.description: The lack of sufficient water resources for plant growth

entities.name: SALINITY
entities.description: High salt concentration in the soil

entities.name: LOW SOIL FERTILITY
entities.description: The deficiency of essential nutrients in the soil

entities.name: GLOBAL WARMING
entities.description: The increase in Earth's average surface temperature

entities.name: DEVELOPING WORLD
entities.description: Regions characterized by lower industrialization and economic development

entities.name: GREEN REVOLUTION
entities.description: A period of significant increase in agricultural productivity

entities.name: STRESS-ADAPTIVE MECHANISMS
entities.description: Biological processes that allow plants to adapt to stressful environments
